name: Victor Narrow
classification_notes: The name and URL suggest a narrow or condensed grotesque sans-serif, consistent with utilitarian display and text grotesques from Central and Eastern European type traditions.
summary: A narrow grotesque sans from KOMETA Typefaces, suited to compact typesetting and display work.
description: Victor Narrow is a condensed grotesque sans designed for use in tight column measures and headline settings. The narrow proportions lend themselves to editorial layouts where space is at a premium without sacrificing legibility. KOMETA Typefaces is a foundry working within a Central and Eastern European type tradition, and Victor Narrow reflects that utilitarian sensibility.
foundry_blurb: Victor Narrow is a typeface from KOMETA Typefaces, offered as a condensed grotesque suitable for demanding typographic conditions where economy of space is required.
